name: TITANIA
title: WITHERED ROSE

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Juggernaut
abilities.text: This model reduces all damage dealt to it to 3 (if more than 3).

abilities.name: Wrath of the Wildlands
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) to deal 2 damage to all enemy models in base contact with any Underbrush markers, ignoring LoS. This model heals an amount equal to the damage suffered.

actions.name: The Withering
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, the target gains an Injured token.

triggers.name: Those Who Consume the Land
triggers.text: Target a model in base contact with an Underbrush marker. Another friendly model within 8" of the target may place into base contact with the target and declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: What the Queen is Due
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target must drain a (fortitude) if able. If it does, infuse a (fortitude).

triggers.name: Withering Away
triggers.text: Target must have an Injured token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Germinate
actions.effects: Make an Underbrush marker within range.

triggers.name: Spring Forth
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with the marker.

triggers.name: Forest's Bounty
triggers.text: If this is not the first time this trigger was declared this activation, discard a card. Allies within (r)12" of the made marker heal 2.

actions.name: Thirsty Roots
actions.effects: Target an Underbrush marker. Remove one Remains or Scheme marker within 2" of the target to draw a card.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='WITHERED ROSE' back='Withered Rose'
extraction_notes: Fortitude icon appears in The Withering action as (fortitude) - represented in text as (fortitude)
Warding icon appears in What the Queen is Due trigger - represented as (warding)
Forest's Bounty trigger contains '(r)12"' notation for range in the trigger text
